STATUS: CONNECTING
HOW TO PLAY
01
PREDICT
Click Higher or Lower — predict where BTC will be when the timer hits zero.
02
DURATION
30S, 60S, or 90S — choose how long your trade lasts.
03
MULTIPLIER
×1 to ×5 — multiply your points per win. ×5 unlocks after 2 consecutive wins.
04
SCORING
Score = wins × mult + streak × 2 + streak bonus. Streaks compound your points.
05
CIRCUIT BREAKER
After 3 consecutive losses, a 6-second cooldown activates.
06
RANKS
Recruit → Analyst → Trader → Senior Trader → Oracle → Sovereign.
RANKS
RECRUIT0 pts
ANALYST5 pts
TRADER15 pts
SENIOR TRADER30 pts
ORACLE50 pts
SOVEREIGN75 pts
Score = wins × multiplier + streak × 2
